Knowledge Base

Installation

Mnemosyne supports multiple installation methods depending on your use case.

Standalone pip Install

The simplest way to get started:

pip install mnemosyne

This installs the core package with all required dependencies.

Hermes Plugin Install

If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes agent plugin:

hermes plugin install mnemosyne

Or add to your hermes.yaml:

plugins:
- name: mnemosyne
  config:
    db_path: ./memory.db
    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small

Development Install

For contributing or running from source:

git clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git
cd mnemosyne
pip install -e &quot;.[dev]&quot;

Dependency Tiers

| Tier | Command | Description | |------|---------|-------------| | Minimal | pip install mnemosyne | Core only, CPU embeddings | | Standard | pip install mnemosyne[openai] | + OpenAI embeddings | | Full | pip install mnemosyne[all] | All optional dependencies |

Verify Your Install

python -c &quot;from mnemosyne import Memory; m = Memory(); print('OK')&quot;
